examples: Faulty wiring is the major cause of house fires.
We had to strip out all the old wiring and start again.
She learned the rudiments of bricklaying, wiring, and plumbing.
In Japan the government is using its fibers in experimentally wiring an entire Japanese town, Nara.
Prof Bullmore expects to see changes in the brain's wiring that gradually bring impulsive behaviour under control.
